name: Detron
description: The sleek lines of the Detron conceal its ferocious nature. The hand cannon's semi-automatic action takes down enemies with speed and efficiency.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The sleek lines of the Detron conceal its ferocious nature. The hand cannon's semi-automatic action takes down enemies with speed and efficiency.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Cleaned up FX to improve performance with the Detron/Mara Detron, and tweaked their projectile lifetime to 3-5 seconds.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the FX on the edge of the War fading out very quickly if the Mara Detron is equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Detron and Mara Detron projectile firing incorrectly when in Glaive+Gun mode.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed numerous projectile weapons (Detron, Drakgoon, Cernos Prime, etc) having incorrect Status Chance calculations.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Detron Mara having the name switched as Mara Detron.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zanuka having a chance of dropping both the Detron Blueprint and a Detron part (unlike any other Stalker-type enemy).

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Brakk, Bronco series, Detron series, Castanas Series and Pyrana are now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.1.0: Quanta & Dendra
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Detron piece drops using the incorrect item pickup model.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Tweaked the depth cue on energy projectile's flares so they aren't so large in the distance (Detron Projectile feedback changes).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed status chance for projectile weapons that shot multiple pellets (Drakgoon/Detron).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Buffed Harvesters spawn rate (doubled) + guaranteed Detron component drop upon death.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: …Perhaps a Detron can be secured if a Harvester is Procured? But beware, if it’s the Detron you seek, the New Harvester is not for the weak!
